raw_consumer_statement: I used an American Express to make XXXX purchases for travel insurance to be provided in late XXXX. The merchant- the XXXX XXXX company- stated that there was no policy purchased or claimed that the policy had not been paid for. I filed XXXX disputes with American Express ( AMEX Disputes numbers XXXX and XXXX ). The merchant merely sent AMEX the purported policy but failed to provide all of my numerous communications with the merchant that document that the merchant has failed to provide the service. AMEX is not properly assisting me in disputing these charges.
